description: SQLite-backed hybrid (vector + FTS) code search index for Claude Code over MCP.
name: io.github.achreftlili/code-index

environmentVariables.description: Voyage embeddings API key. Required when CODE_INDEX_EMBEDDER is unset or set to 'voyage' (the default backend).
environmentVariables.name: VOYAGE_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Embedder backend: 'voyage' (default) or 'ollama'. Set to 'ollama' to use a local Ollama server instead of Voyage.
environmentVariables.name: CODE_INDEX_EMBEDDER

environmentVariables.description: Embedding model name. Defaults to 'voyage-code-3' for Voyage. Must match the embedder's available models.
environmentVariables.name: CODE_INDEX_EMBED_MODEL

environmentVariables.description: Embedding dimension. Defaults to 1024 (matches voyage-code-3). Must match the model's output dim.
environmentVariables.name: CODE_INDEX_EMBED_DIM

environmentVariables.description: Path to the SQLite index database. Defaults to .claude/index.db relative to the working directory.
environmentVariables.name: CODE_INDEX_DB

environmentVariables.description: Ollama server URL when CODE_INDEX_EMBEDDER=ollama. Defaults to http://localhost:11434.
environmentVariables.name: OLLAMA_URL

title: Code Index
